sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9256" key="a)nonei/distos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνονείδιστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n9256.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">irreproachable,</tr_> Nic.Dam.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:p.119D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.119D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
